app.title: Architext
app.description: Design your software architecture visually before coding with AI

landing.heroSub: The open-source architecture planner that gives AI the context it needs to build your app right.
landing.why1Desc: A clear blueprint means your AI assistant writes better code on the first try. No more back-and-forth.
landing.why2Desc: Models, endpoints, views, auth flows — all connected on a visual canvas before a single line of code.
landing.why3Desc: Generate ready-to-use prompts, CLAUDE.md files, PRDs, and SQL schemas. Works with Claude Code, Cursor, and more.
landing.how1Desc: Tell the AI what you want to build in plain language.
landing.how2Desc: The AI generates a visual architecture. Drag, connect, and refine blocks.
landing.how3Desc: Export the blueprint and feed it to your favorite AI coding tool.
landing.openSourceDesc: MIT licensed. Self-host it, fork it, contribute to it.
landing.freeDesc: Bring your own API key. No subscriptions, no usage limits from us.
landing.privateDesc: Self-hostable. Your architecture stays on your infrastructure.
landing.finalCta: Ready to plan your next project?
